recommendations.title: Police Academy 3: Back in Training
recommendations.overview: When police funding is cut, the Governor announces he must close one of the academies. To make it fair, the two police academies must compete against each other to stay in operation. Mauser persuades two officers in Lassard's academy to better his od

recommendations.title: Lifechanger
recommendations.overview: A murderous shapeshifter sets out on a blood-soaked mission to make things right with the woman he loves.

recommendations.title: Win a Date with Tad Hamilton!
recommendations.overview: A small-town girl wins a date with a Hollywood star through a contest. When the date goes better than expected, a love triangle forms between the girl, the celebrity, and the girl's best friend.

recommendations.title: Dirty Girl
recommendations.overview: Accompanied by her closeted gay buddy, a promiscuous teenager sets out to find her long-absent father.

recommendations.title: Project X
recommendations.overview: Three high school seniors throw a party to make a name for themselves. As the night progresses, things spiral out of control as word of the party spreads.

recommendations.title: Barbarian
recommendations.overview: In town for a job interview, a young woman arrives at her Airbnb late at night only to find that it has been mistakenly double-booked and a strange man is already staying there. Against her better judgement, she decides to stay the night anyway.

recommendations.title: Local Hero
recommendations.overview: An American oil company sends a man to Scotland to buy up an entire village where they want to build a refinery. But things don't go as expected.

recommendations.title: To Wong Foo, Thanks for Everything! Julie Newmar
recommendations.overview: Manhattan drag queens Vida Boheme and Noxeema Jackson impress regional judges in competition, securing berths in the Nationals in Los Angeles. When the two meet pathetic drag novice Chi-Chi Rodriguez — one of the losers that evening — the charmed Vid

recommendations.title: The Fox and the Hound

recommendations.director: Ted Berman, Art Stevens, Richard Rich

recommendations.title: My Worst Nightmare
